Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Zenith Cannon]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 4''' — A device matching the Zenith Cannon passed through Mell's location last year.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 8''' — The Zenith Cannon is a device the crew is searching for.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 8''' — The Zenith Cannon is one of the seven Zenith Devices.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 13''' — The Zenith Cannon is an object the narrator's magic is better used hunting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 17''' — The Zenith Cannon is a sought-after object.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 19''' — The Zenith Cannon is a weapon that Mell suggests retrieving.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 21''' — Benri Vallenar acquired the Zenith Cannon as a sacrificial play.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 21''' — The Zenith Cannon is a weapon that Varic needs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 22''' — The Zenith Cannon is a genuine Zenith Device that manifests as a standard plasma pistol.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 22''' — The Zenith Cannon's appearance is similar to a Lightcaster IV plasma pistol.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 22''' — The Zenith Cannon has an external shell of white metal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 22''' — The Zenith Cannon's interior is folded space, similar to Shadow Ark.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 22''' — The Zenith Cannon's interior dimensions are large enough to contain a dreadnought without increasing its mass.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 22''' — The Zenith Cannon is a sentient weapon that can speak and conduct quizzes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 23''' — The narrator's father donated the Zenith Cannon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 33''' — The Zenith Cannon is cradled by Omega.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 35''' — Omega has been whispering to the Zenith Cannon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 36''' — Sola has the Zenith Cannon away from Omega.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 37''' — The Perfected had acquired the Zenith Cannon.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 23''' — The Zenith Cannon resembles a small multicolored sun with arms like solar flares.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 25''' — The Zenith Cannon is a weapon that Mell studied to develop drone firepower.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
